Central New York's First Mobile Golf Trailer

About Us

The Golf Cart is a mobile entertainment experience that brings the excitement and growing popularity of golf directly to your event. No more dedicating an entire day to the course, coordinating schedules at a clubhouse, or worrying about weather and crowded tee times. Our state-of-the-art mobile golf simulator delivers all the fun of the game—right to your doorstep. Whether it’s a party, corporate gathering, or special event, we make enjoying golf easy, convenient, and unforgettable.

Our Service Area

We service Central New York.
 

Currently, our standard coverage is roughly a 30 mile radius around Syracuse, NY.
 

Need us outside that area? We’re happy to travel to accommodate your event for an additional travel fee.

No matter the location, we deliver our signature
”Tee Off Anywhere experience—wherever your event takes place!

Frequently Asked Questions

FAQs

A $200 deposit is required to secure your booking date and time. Your reservation is not confirmed until the deposit has been received.

Cancellations made within 24 hours of the event may not be refundable. Earlier cancellations due to severe weather may be eligible for rescheduling or a refund. Light rain does not automatically qualify for cancellation.

Setup time may vary depending on the event location and layout, but we recommend allowing enough time before your event begins so everything can be installed and ready for play.

Absolutely! Children are welcome to join in—just be sure they swing under adult supervision.

We require a reasonably level and safe area for setup. Space requirements may vary depending on the location, so we recommend contacting us in advance to confirm your event space is suitable.

No—unless you’re a serious golfer and prefer to bring your own. We provide both left and right handed sets for casual play.

Yes. For the safety of everyone and the protection of the equipment, guests are expected to behave respectfully and follow all instructions during use. We reserve the right to suspend service if behavior becomes unsafe, abusive, or disruptive.

Yes — additional time may be available if scheduling allows. Extra time is billed at $200 per hour in 30-minute increments, and payment must be made before the additional time begins.

In some cases, yes. If needed, the client must provide access to a safe and nearby power outlet, unless other arrangements have been made in advance.
